# Customer Request Template

- `Title:`
- `Description:` (prefer `As a <Role>, I want <Goal> so that <Outcome>`)
- `Context:` (customer, ticket, escalation, business impact, contract/SLA constraints if known)
- `Acceptance Criteria:` (prefer `Given/When/Then`)
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Source References:`
- `Engineering Stage-Gated Details:` (optional; include only when explicitly requested or required)
  - `Scope:`
  - `Out of Scope:`
  - `Assumptions:`
  - `Dependencies:`
  - `Estimate:`
  - `Priority:`
  - `QA Evidence:`
  - `Technical Notes:`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
